name: Manas Jha
title: Backend & AI Software Engineer
tagline: Building scalable backend systems and AI-powered applications ✨
lines: Hey there! 👋 I'm Manas — a backend-focused software engineer
passionate about building reliable APIs, AI systems, and developer tools.
I work with Python, FastAPI, Django, LangChain, RAG pipelines,
vector databases, and scalable backend architectures.
I enjoy turning complex ideas into clean, production-ready systems
with a strong focus on performance, simplicity, and usability.
Currently open to backend, AI engineering, and systems-focused roles.
Type "contact" to connect — let's build something impactful!
